source.notes: Covers the failure shape where the Narrator streamed player-visible prose after a roll but omitted narrate_turn. The repair path must ask only for the missing commit annotation against the already-streamed prose, without rewriting prose or requesting another roll.

input.playerInput: Let Auln run the diagnostic and tell me what the readout says.

narrator.prose: (unused - this fixture asserts on the missing-narrate_turn repair request shape)

narratorCommitRepair.completedAssistantProse: Auln clips the external diagnostic lead into the berth-side port. The panel thinks for three seconds, then paints the cargo bay in thermal amber: one body-sized bloom, cycling moisture and heat like breath. The crate is not inert cargo. Whatever Solv paid to move is alive.
assistantMessageContainsAll: Whatever Solv paid to move is alive
requestMessageContainsAll: Emit exactly one narrate_turn tool call
